# Beauty Sleep Studio PDX — Complete Business Information

> Beauty Sleep Studio is Portland, Oregon's top-rated lash extension, lash lift, and brow lamination studio, located in the Nob Hill neighborhood of Northwest Portland. Owned and operated by Haley, a licensed esthetician since 2008 with nearly two decades of experience in lash artistry and skincare.

## Business Details

- Business Name: Beauty Sleep Studio PDX
- Owner/Esthetician: Haley
- Licensed Since: 2008
- Location: 1308 NW 20th Ave, Suite 4, Portland, OR 97209
- Neighborhood: Nob Hill / Northwest Portland
- Landmark: Overton Center — a blue house on the corner of NW 20th Ave and NW Overton St
- Phone: 928-499-1270 (call or text)
- Email: beautysleepstudiopdx@gmail.com
- Website: https://www.beautysleepstudiopdx.com
- Booking: https://square.site/book/DYKA7NPF92BP7/beauty-sleep-studio-portland-or
- Parking: Street parking available (pay to park)

| Sunday    | Closed           |

## Service Menu & Pricing

### Lash Extensions

Lash extensions are individually applied to each natural lash, offering added length and fullness without the need for mascara. Every set is customized to the client's unique eye shape and desired look — from subtle and natural to bold and dramatic.

| Service                     | Price | Duration Notes          |
|-----------------------------|-------|-------------------------|
| Classic Full Set            | $180  | One extension per lash   |
| Hybrid Full Set             | $210  | Mix of classic + volume  |
| Volume Full Set             | $260  | 3–6 extensions per lash  |
| Classic Fill (60 min)       | $80   |                         |
| Classic Fill (90 min)       | $100  |                         |
| Hybrid Fill (60 min)        | $90   |                         |
| Hybrid Fill (90 min)        | $110  |                         |
| Volume Fill (90 min)        | $120  |                         |

### Lash Lifts & Tinting

Lash lifts curl your natural lashes upward for up to eight weeks — no maintenance needed. Combined with a tint, it's the perfect low-maintenance alternative to extensions.

| Service          | Price | Lasts       |
|------------------|-------|-------------|
| Lash Lift + Tint | $100  | 6–8 weeks   |
| Lash Lift Only   | $85   | 6–8 weeks   |
| Lash Tint Only   | $30   | Up to 4 wks |

### Brow Lamination

Brow lamination redirects brow hairs upward to create a fuller, more defined brow shape. The treatment makes hairs malleable so they can be styled with gel or brow soap. Lasts up to 6 weeks.

Available upon request — mention in your booking notes.

## Aftercare Products

- Elleeplex Profusion Serum: $40 (recommended daily use after lash lift)
- Elleevate Lash Serum: $40 (nourishes and strengthens natural lashes)

## Frequently Asked Questions

### Lash Extensions FAQ

Q: How long do lash extensions last?
A: Lash extensions follow the natural lash growth cycle — typically 2–4 weeks before a fill is needed. With regular fills every 2–3 weeks, you can maintain your lashes indefinitely.

Q: What's the difference between Classic, Hybrid, and Volume?
A: Classic applies one extension per natural lash for a natural look. Hybrid mixes classic and volume techniques for moderate fullness. Volume applies 3–6 lightweight extensions per lash for a dramatic, fluffy look.

Q: How should I prepare for my lash extension appointment?
A: Arrive with clean, makeup-free eyes. Avoid oil-based products around the eye area before your appointment. The application takes 1.5–2.5 hours depending on the style.

Q: How do I care for my lash extensions?
A: Avoid water and steam for the first 24 hours. Don't use oil-based products near your eyes. Gently brush your lashes daily with a clean spoolie. Sleep on your back when possible.

### Lash Lift FAQ

Q: How should I prepare for a lash lift?
A: Come without eye makeup. After your treatment, keep lashes dry for 24 hours for the best curl set.

Q: How long does a lash lift last?
A: A lash lift lasts 6–8 weeks. The tint lasts up to 4 weeks. Use Elleeplex or Elleevate serum daily to maintain lash health.

Q: Can I wear mascara after a lash lift?
A: Yes, but most clients find they don't need it. If you do, avoid waterproof mascara as the remover can break down the lift.

### Brow Lamination FAQ

Q: How should I prepare for brow lamination?
A: Come with clean brows, already shaped if possible. Avoid brow products the day of your appointment.

Q: How long does brow lamination last?
A: Up to 6 weeks. The treatment makes your brow hairs malleable — use gel or brow soap daily to hold your preferred style.

Q: Can I combine brow lamination with a lash lift?
A: Yes! Many clients book both services in the same appointment. Just mention it in your booking notes.

## Policies

### Cancellations & No Shows
24-hour notice is required for all cancellations. Late cancellations (within 24 hours) are subject to a 50% service charge. No-shows are charged the full service amount.

### Running Late
Text Haley if you're running late. She will do her best in the remaining time, but the full appointment price applies regardless.

### Illness Policy
If you're feeling sick, reschedule at no charge. Clients who arrive with symptoms will be asked to leave and charged the full service amount.

### Children & Guests
Please attend your appointment alone. The studio maintains a calm, relaxing environment for all clients.

## About Haley

Haley is a licensed esthetician who has been working in the beauty industry since 2008 — nearly two decades of experience. Originally from Wisconsin and raised in Arizona, she has called Oregon home for over twelve years. She is passionate about helping clients feel confident and beautiful through expert lash and skincare services.

Her philosophy centers on creating a relaxing, inviting environment where clients can enjoy dedicated self-care time. She specializes in customizing every lash set to each client's unique eye shape and personal style.

Beauty Sleep Studio serves clients throughout the Portland metropolitan area, including:
- Northwest Portland / Nob Hill

- Gresham
- Clackamas
- Vancouver, WA
